structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier) @scope
      name: (identifier) @func)
    arguments: (argument_list))
  operator: "+"
  right: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier)
      name: (identifier)))
  (#match? @scope "absl")
  (#match? @func "^(Nanoseconds|Microseconds|Milliseconds|Seconds|Minutes|Hours)$")) @offender

(binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier) @ns
      name: (identifier) @fn)
    arguments: (argument_list))
  operator: _
  right: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier)
      name: (identifier)))
  (#match? @ns "^absl$")
  (#match? @fn "^(ToInt64Nanoseconds|ToInt64Microseconds|ToInt64Milliseconds|ToInt64Seconds|ToInt64Minutes|ToInt64Hours|ToDoubleNanoseconds|ToDoubleMicroseconds|ToDoubleMilliseconds|ToDoubleSeconds|ToDoubleMinutes|ToDoubleHours)$")) @offender

(call_expression
  function: (qualified_identifier
    scope: (namespace_identifier) @ns
    name: (identifier) @func)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (call_expression
      function: (qualified_identifier
        scope: (namespace_identifier)
        name: (identifier)) @duration_func))
  (#match? @ns "^absl$")
  (#match? @func "^(ToInt64Nanoseconds|ToInt64Microseconds|ToInt64Milliseconds|ToInt64Seconds|ToInt64Minutes|ToInt64Hours|ToDoubleNanoseconds|ToDoubleMicroseconds|ToDoubleMilliseconds|ToDoubleSeconds|ToDoubleMinutes|ToDoubleHours)$")
  (#match? @duration_func "^(Nanoseconds|Microseconds|Milliseconds|Seconds|Minutes|Hours)$")) @offender

(call_expression
  function: (qualified_identifier
    scope: (namespace_identifier) @scope
    name: (identifier) @func)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (binary_expression
      operator: ["*" "/"]
      right: (number_literal))) @offender
  (#match? @scope "absl")
  (#match? @func "^(Nanoseconds|Microseconds|Milliseconds|Seconds|Minutes|Hours)$"))

(binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier) @scope
      name: (identifier) @func)
    arguments: (argument_list))
  operator: "-"
  right: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier)
      name: (identifier)))
  (#match? @scope "^absl$")
  (#match? @func "^(Nanoseconds|Microseconds|Milliseconds|Seconds|Minutes|Hours)$")) @offender

(call_expression
  function: (qualified_identifier
    scope: (namespace_identifier) @scope
    name: (identifier) @func)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (call_expression
      function: (qualified_identifier
        scope: (namespace_identifier)
        name: (identifier) @inner_func)))
  (#match? @scope "absl")
  (#match? @func "^(ToInt64Nanoseconds|ToInt64Microseconds|ToInt64Milliseconds|ToInt64Seconds|ToInt64Minutes|ToInt64Hours|ToDoubleNanoseconds|ToDoubleMicroseconds|ToDoubleMilliseconds|ToDoubleSeconds|ToDoubleMinutes|ToDoubleHours)$")
  (#match? @inner_func "^(Nanoseconds|Microseconds|Milliseconds|Seconds|Minutes|Hours)$")) @offender

((call_expression
  function: (qualified_identifier
    scope: (namespace_identifier) @scope
    name: (identifier) @func)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (call_expression
      function: (qualified_identifier
        scope: (namespace_identifier)
        name: (identifier) @inner_func)))) @offender
  (#match? @scope "absl")
  (#match? @func "StrCat")
  (#match? @inner_func "StrCat"))

(expression_statement
  (assignment_expression
    left: (identifier) @var
    right: (call_expression
      function: (qualified_identifier
        scope: (namespace_identifier) @scope
        name: (identifier) @func)
      arguments: (argument_list
        (identifier) @arg1
        (_)*))
    (#eq? @scope "absl")
    (#match? @func "StrCat|StrAppend")
    (#eq? @var @arg1)) @offender)

(binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier) @scope
      name: (identifier) @func)
    arguments: (argument_list))
  operator: [
    "=="
    "!="
    "<"
    ">"
    "<="
    ">="
  ]
  right: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier)
      name: (identifier)))
  (#match? @scope "^absl$")
  (#match? @func "^(ToUnixNanos|ToUnixMicros|ToUnixMillis|ToUnixSeconds|ToTimeT|ToUDate|ToUniversal|ToChrono)$")) @offender

((binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier) @scope
      name: (identifier) @func)
    arguments: (argument_list))
  operator: "-"
  right: (call_expression
    function: (qualified_identifier
      scope: (namespace_identifier)
      name: (identifier))))
  (#match? @scope "absl")
  (#match? @func "(Now|UnixEpoch|FromTimeT|FromChrono|FromUniversal|InfiniteFuture|InfinitePast)")) @offender

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (field_identifier) @constructor_name
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (type_identifier) @param_type
        (reference_declarator))))
  body: (compound_statement
    (expression_statement
      (assignment_expression
        left: (field_expression
          argument: (this)
          field: (field_identifier))
        right: (field_expression
          argument: (identifier)
          field: (field_identifier)))) @offender))

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (field_identifier)
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (type_identifier)
        declarator: (reference_declarator
          (identifier)))))
  body: (compound_statement
    (expression_statement
      (assignment_expression
        left: (_)
        right: (_))))) @offender

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (_) @type1
        declarator: (_)? @param1)
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (_) @type2
        declarator: (_)? @param2)
      (#eq? @type1 @type2))) @offender)

(for_statement
  initializer: (declaration
    type: [(primitive_type) (type_identifier)]
    declarator: (init_declarator
      declarator: (identifier) @offender))
  condition: (binary_expression
    left: (identifier)
    right: (_))
  update: (update_expression
    argument: (identifier))
  (#match? @offender "float|double"))

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (template_function
      name: (_) @name)
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (type_identifier) @param_type
        declarator: (reference_declarator
          (identifier)))
      (#match? @param_type "^[A-Z]"))))

(call_expression
  function: (field_expression
    argument: (call_expression
      function: (identifier) @_func
      (#match? @_func "^(remove|remove_if)$"))
    field: (field_identifier) @_method
    (#eq? @_method "erase"))
  arguments: (argument_list
    (call_expression
      function: (identifier) @_remove
      (#match? @_remove "^(remove|remove_if)$")))) @offender

(call_expression
  function: (identifier) @func
  arguments: (argument_list
    (binary_expression
      left: (call_expression
        function: (identifier) @strlen
        arguments: (argument_list))
      operator: "+"
      right: (_)) @offender)
  (#eq? @func "malloc")
  (#eq? @strlen "strlen"))

(call_expression
  function: (identifier) @func
  arguments: (argument_list
    (binary_expression
      left: (call_expression
        function: (identifier) @alloc
        (#match? @alloc "^(malloc|calloc|realloc|aligned_alloc)$"))
      operator: "+"
      right: (_)) @offender)
  (#match? @func "^(malloc|calloc|realloc|aligned_alloc)$"))

(cast_expression
  type: (_) @cast_type
  value: (binary_expression) @offender
  (#match? @cast_type "(long|int64_t|unsigned long|uint64_t|long long|unsigned long long)"))

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (identifier) @func_name
    parameters: (parameter_list))
  body: (compound_statement
    (declaration
      type: (_)
      declarator: (init_declarator
        declarator: (identifier)
        value: (call_expression
          function: (identifier) @generator
          arguments: (argument_list
            (call_expression
              function: (qualified_identifier
                scope: (namespace_identifier) @ns
                name: (identifier) @seed_func)))))) @offender)
  (#match? @generator "(default_random_engine|mt19937|mt19937_64|minstd_rand|minstd_rand0|ranlux24|ranlux48)")
  (#eq? @ns "std")
  (#eq? @seed_func "time")
  (#eq? @func_name "main"))

(for_statement
  initializer: (declaration
    declarator: (init_declarator
      declarator: (identifier) @loop_var
      value: (_)))
  condition: (binary_expression
    left: (identifier) @cond_var
    operator: "<"
    right: (_) @limit)
  (#eq? @loop_var @cond_var)) @offender

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator) @func
  body: (compound_statement
    (expression_statement
      (assignment_expression
        left: (field_expression
          argument: (this)
          field: (_) @field)
        right: (_))) @offender))

(
  [
    (subscript_expression
      argument: (identifier) @offender)
    (call_expression
      arguments: (argument_list
        (identifier) @offender))
    (assignment_expression
      right: (identifier) @offender)
    (declaration
      declarator: (init_declarator
        value: (identifier) @offender))
    (return_statement
      (identifier) @offender)
    (binary_expression
      left: (identifier) @offender)
    (binary_expression
      right: (identifier) @offender)
  ]
)

(class_specifier
  body: (field_declaration_list
    [
      (function_definition
        declarator: (function_declarator
          declarator: (destructor_name)))
      (function_definition
        declarator: (function_declarator
          declarator: (field_identifier) @name
          parameters: (parameter_list
            (parameter_declaration
              type: (type_identifier)
              declarator: (reference_declarator)))))
      (function_definition
        declarator: (function_declarator
          declarator: (operator_name)
          parameters: (parameter_list
            (parameter_declaration
              type: (type_identifier)
              declarator: (reference_declarator)))))
    ])) @offender

examples.bad:
#define DOCTEST_TEST_CASE_TEMPLATE_INSTANTIATE_IMPL(id, anon, ...)                                 \
    DOCTEST_GLOBAL_NO_WARNINGS(DOCTEST_CAT(anon, DUMMY), /* NOLINT(cert-err58-cpp, fuchsia-statically-constructed-objects) */ \
        doctest::detail::instantiationHelper(                                                      \
            DOCTEST_CAT(id, ITERATOR)<__VA_ARGS__>(__FILE__, __LINE__, 0)))

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(function_definition
  type: (primitive_type) @return_type
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (identifier)
    parameters: (parameter_list))
  body: (compound_statement
    (declaration
      type: (_)
      declarator: (identifier)) @offender))

examples.bad:
DOCTEST_REGISTER_FUNCTION(DOCTEST_EMPTY, func, decorators)                                 \
    }                                                                                              \
    DOCTEST_INLINE_NOINLINE void der::f() // NOLINT(misc-definitions-in-headers)

#define DOCTEST_CREATE_AND_REGISTER_FUNCTION(f, decorators)                                        \

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (field_identifier) @name
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (type_identifier)
        declarator: (reference_declarator))))
  (#match? @name "^operator=$")
  body: (compound_statement
    (return_statement
      (identifier) (#not-eq? @name "this"))?) @offender)

(call_expression
  function: (field_expression
    argument: (identifier) @ptr1
    field: (field_identifier) @method)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (call_expression
      function: (field_expression
        argument: (identifier) @ptr2
        field: (field_identifier) @release_method)
      arguments: (argument_list)))
  (#eq? @method "reset")
  (#eq? @release_method "release")
  (#eq? @ptr1 @ptr2)) @offender

(for_statement
  initializer: (declaration
    declarator: (init_declarator
      declarator: (identifier) @iterator))
  condition: (binary_expression
    left: (identifier)
    right: (_))
  update: (update_expression
    argument: (identifier))
  body: (_
    (subscript_expression
      argument: (identifier)))) @offender

(expression_statement
  (call_expression
    function: (field_expression
      argument: (_)
      field: (field_identifier) @field (#match? @field "^(push_back|push_front|insert)$"))
    arguments: (argument_list
      (call_expression
        function: (identifier)
        arguments: (argument_list)))) @offender)

(binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (field_expression
      argument: (_)
      field: (field_identifier) @field (#match? @field "^(find|rfind)$"))
    arguments: (argument_list))
  operator: ["==" "!="]
  right: (number_literal) @zero (#eq? @zero "0")) @offender

examples.bad:

template <class charT>

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (identifier)
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (type_identifier)
        declarator: (reference_declarator))))
  body: (compound_statement)) @offender

(call_expression
  function: (identifier) @func
  arguments: (argument_list
    (call_expression
      function: (field_expression
        argument: (_)
        field: (field_identifier) @method)
      arguments: (argument_list)))
  (#match? @func "^(std::)?string$")
  (#match? @method "^(c_str|data)$")) @offender

(binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (field_expression
      argument: (_)
      field: (field_identifier) @field (#match? @field "^(find|count)$"))
    arguments: (argument_list)) @offender
  operator: "!="
  right: (call_expression
    function: (field_expression
      field: (field_identifier) @method (#eq? @method "end"))))

(binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (field_expression
      argument: (_)
      field: (field_identifier) @field (#match? @field "^(size|length)$"))
    arguments: (argument_list)) @offender
  operator: ["==" "!=" ">" "<" ">=" "<="]
  right: (number_literal) @num (#eq? @num "0"))

(binary_expression
  left: (call_expression
    function: (field_expression
      argument: (_)
      field: (field_identifier) @field)
    arguments: (argument_list))
  operator: ["==" "!="]
  right: (number_literal) @offender
  (#eq? @field "compare"))

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (identifier) @offender)
  body: (compound_statement
    (declaration
      declarator: (init_declarator
        declarator: (array_declarator
          declarator: (identifier)
          size: (_)))) @offender))

examples.bad:
DOCTEST_MSVC_SUPPRESS_WARNING_WITH_PUSH(4643)

namespace std { // NOLINT(cert-dcl58-cpp)
typedef decltype(nullptr) nullptr_t; // NOLINT(modernize-use-using)
typedef decltype(sizeof(void*)) size_t; // NOLINT(modernize-use-using)

        doctest::detail::instantiationHelper(                                                      \
            DOCTEST_CAT(id, ITERATOR)<__VA_ARGS__>(__FILE__, __LINE__, 0)))

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(class_specifier
  body: (field_declaration_list
    (function_definition
      declarator: (function_declarator
        declarator: (field_identifier) @offender
        parameters: (parameter_list))
      body: (compound_statement
        (expression_statement
          (assignment_expression
            left: (_)
            right: (this)))))))

(class_specifier
  body: (field_declaration_list
    (function_definition
      declarator: (function_declarator
        declarator: (field_identifier) @offender
        parameters: (parameter_list))
      body: (compound_statement
        (expression_statement
          (assignment_expression
            left: (field_expression
              argument: (this)
              field: (field_identifier))
            right: (_)))))))

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (identifier) @func_name
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (primitive_type) @param_type
        declarator: (pointer_declarator
          declarator: (identifier) @param_name))))
  body: (compound_statement
    (expression_statement
      (assignment_expression
        left: (pointer_expression
          argument: (identifier) @assigned_param)
        right: (_)))
  (#eq? @assigned_param @param_name))) @offender

(function_definition
  body: (compound_statement
    (expression_statement
      (binary_expression
        left: (binary_expression
          operator: "<<")
        right: (call_expression
          function: (identifier) @offender
          arguments: (argument_list))))))

(class_specifier
  body: (field_declaration_list
    (function_definition
      declarator: (function_declarator
        declarator: (field_identifier)
        parameters: (parameter_list))
      body: (compound_statement
        (expression_statement
          (call_expression
            function: [
              (identifier)
              (field_expression)
              (this)
            ])) @offender))))

(for_statement
  initializer: (_)
  condition: (_)
  update: (_)
  body: (compound_statement
    (expression_statement
      (assignment_expression
        left: (identifier) @var
        right: (call_expression
          function: (identifier) @func
          (#match? @func "^(CFArrayGetValueAtIndex|CFDictionaryGetValue)$")))) @offender))

(function_definition
  body: (compound_statement
    (declaration
      declarator: (init_declarator
        declarator: (pointer_declarator
          declarator: (pointer_declarator
            declarator: (identifier) @error_var))
        value: (number_literal)))
    (expression_statement
      (call_expression
        arguments: (argument_list
          (identifier) @error_var))))) @offender

(
  (class_specifier
    body: (field_declaration_list
      (function_definition
        declarator: (function_declarator
          declarator: (identifier) @init_method)
        body: (compound_statement
          (expression_statement
            (assignment_expression
              left: (identifier) @self
              right: (_))) @offender))))
  (#match? @init_method "^init")
  (#eq? @self "self")
)

(for_statement
  initializer: (declaration
    declarator: (init_declarator
      declarator: (identifier) @loop_var
      value: (_)))
  condition: (binary_expression
    left: (identifier)
    right: (_))
  update: (update_expression
    argument: (identifier) @offender)
  (#match? @offender "^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$"))

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (identifier)
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (_)
        declarator: (_)?))) @offender
  (#match? @offender "^(?!explicit)")
  body: (compound_statement))

(
  (expression_statement
    (call_expression
      function: (identifier)
      arguments: (argument_list
        (call_expression
          function: (qualified_identifier
            scope: (namespace_identifier) @std
            name: (identifier) @move)))))
  (expression_statement
    (call_expression
      arguments: (argument_list

  (#eq? @std "std")
  (#eq? @move "move")
)

(function_definition
  declarator: (function_declarator
    declarator: (identifier) @offender
    parameters: (parameter_list
      (parameter_declaration
        type: (type_identifier)
        declarator: (reference_declarator))))
  body: (compound_statement))

(class_specifier
  body: (field_declaration_list
    [
      (function_definition
        declarator: (function_declarator
          declarator: (destructor_name)))
      (function_definition
        declarator: (function_declarator
          declarator: (field_identifier) @name
          parameters: (parameter_list
            (parameter_declaration
              type: (type_identifier)
              declarator: (reference_declarator)))))
      (function_definition
